channel.title: Image slideshow/carousel using featured_media
channel.description:
<!-- I am fairly new to React and Frontity and I am having a hard time trying to create an image slideshow using the mars theme. I'd like to make it easy to change images in the slideshow using the wordpress backend. I don't really need the blogging portion of the theme. All I need is a the header, body, where I'd be placing 2 image slideshows, and the footer. I haven't seen a ton of resources out there, so I'm wondering what would be the best way to accomplish this? I really appreciate any help on this matter. Thank you.
Are you asking about "how to solve a specific issue/error/problem in your Frontity project"?
If so, please check this guide on the information we suggest you include in your topic so the community (and the Frontity team) can provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible
https://community.frontity.org/t/about-the-dev-talk-questions-category/2/3
The info you may provide: - Description of your issue - Specific errors you’re getting in the terminal or in the browser’s console - A repository with the code of your project - A deployed version of your site - The URL of your WP REST API
-->

item.title: Image slideshow/carousel using featured_media
item.dc:creator: faheemkhan420786
item.description:
I also need image slideshow for my grill desire site page to make it proper.

Read full topic
